extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won from an impossible position inside 200m, surging up the barriers after GAVIRIA Fernando's leadout seemed decisive.
tactical_patterns: GANNA Filippo's prolonged front turn inside 20km fragmented positioning, exposing teams who couldn't hold his wheel.
ACKERMANN chose barrier line at 200m when boxed, exploiting sprinters' hesitation to follow dangerous margins.
BORA commits to MAJKA Rafał GC over sprint stages despite leader's jersey, revealing hierarchy pre-stage 2.

rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: won after six days off bike illness, suggests peak form arrives faster than expected
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: UAE leadout delivered him perfectly but faded final 100m, conditioning question mark early season
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: crashed inside 3km while positioned to lead out VAN DER POEL, support reliability concern
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: INEOS deployed him as selection tool before sprint finish, shows tactical flexibility beyond TT
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: neutral: EF positioned him fourth despite being non-specialist, suggests team sprint depth issues
